code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    mut j = i
    while j < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        j = n + 1
      else
        j = j + 1
        if j == n
          j = n
        end
      end
    end
    if j > n
      let tok_end = j - 1
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, tok_end)
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        product = product * v
      end
      i = tok_end + 1
    else
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, j)
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        product = product * v
      end
      i = j + 1
    end
  end
  println("product=#{product}")
end
